title: Claude Code plugin manifest (.claude-plugin/plugin.json)
description: Hand-curated schema for the Claude Code per-plugin manifest. Documents the field types observed in the published Claude Code plugin manifest spec and rejects the historical bug patterns that broke install for adr-kit users. Bugs prevented: (1) v0.7.2 bug -- repository declared as object {type, url}, npm-style; the manifest schema requires a plain URL string. (2) v0.7.1 bug was a missing marketplace.json, covered by the sibling schema marketplace.json.schema.json plus the required-files CI step. (3) Defensive: author must be an object {name, ...}, not a plain string.

name.description: Plugin name. Kebab-case, lowercase, starts with a letter.

description.description: Short human-readable description shown in the plugin picker.

version.description: Semantic version: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH with optional pre-release suffix.

author.description: Author info. Must be an object; plain strings are rejected (some manifests in the wild used a string, the official spec wants an object).

repository.description: Repository URL as a plain string. Historical bug fixed in v0.7.2: the field was declared as an object {type, url} (npm package.json style), which the Claude Code plugin manifest schema rejects with 'expected string, received object'. Use a plain URL string instead.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or short license name.

dependencies.description: Other plugins this plugin depends on. Empty array for none.
